headline: Intuitive Machines Reports Q4 2025 Financial Results
summary: Intuitive Machines reported Q4 2025 revenue of $44.8 million, with a gross margin of 19%, and a combined February backlog of approximately $943 million, setting a strong foundation for 2026.
why_it_matters: The solid financial performance and substantial backlog indicate a robust pipeline, supporting Intuitive Machines' long-term growth trajectory.

headline: Reddit's Q1 2026 Earnings Exceed Expectations
summary: Reddit reported Q1 2026 earnings of $1.01 per share, surpassing analysts' expectations of $0.62, with revenue rising 69.1% year-over-year to $663.41 million.
why_it_matters: The strong earnings report underscores Reddit's robust financial health and its ability to monetize its platform effectively, supporting the long-term investment thesis focused on its advertising revenue growth and user engagement.

headline: Axon Reports Q1 2026 Revenue of $807 Million, Up 34% Year Over Year
summary: Axon Enterprise reported Q1 2026 revenue of $807 million, a 34% increase from the previous year, driven by strong demand across its product ecosystem, including AI-driven solutions and counter-drone technologies.
why_it_matters: The significant year-over-year revenue growth underscores Axon's expanding market presence and the successful integration of AI and counter-drone technologies, reinforcing its competitive moat in public safety solutions.

headline: Axon to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings on May 6, 2026
summary: Axon announced the release of its Q1 2026 earnings report, scheduled for May 6, 2026, with a live Zoom webinar to discuss the financial results.

headline: Intuitive Machines Completes $800 Million Acquisition of Lanteris Space Systems
summary: Intuitive Machines closed the $800 million acquisition of Lanteris Space Systems, aiming to become a vertically integrated space prime across commercial, civil, and national security sectors.
why_it_matters: The acquisition enhances Intuitive Machines' capabilities and market share, reinforcing its competitive moat and growth prospects in the space industry.

headline: Rocket Lab Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results: Surpasses All Guidance Metrics Including Revenue, Margin, and Adjusted EBITDA; Posts Record $200M Quarterly Revenue and over $2.2B Backlog; Guides Another Record Revenue
summary: Rocket Lab reported a record $200.3 million in revenue for Q1 2026, a 63.5% increase year-over-year, with a GAAP gross margin of 38.2% and a backlog exceeding $2.2 billion. The company also guided for another record revenue in the upcoming quarter.
why_it_matters: The strong financial performance and substantial backlog indicate robust demand for Rocket Lab's services, supporting the long-term investment thesis focused on the company's growth and market position.

headline: Rocket Lab Awarded $30 Million Contract for HASTE Hypersonic Rocket Launches for Anduril
summary: Rocket Lab secured a $30 million contract with Anduril Industries for multiple hypersonic test flights using its HASTE launch vehicle, aiming to advance hypersonic technologies for future defense missions.
why_it_matters: This contract underscores Rocket Lab's expanding role in defense and hypersonic technologies, enhancing its competitive moat and long-term growth prospects.

headline: Rocket Lab Unveils New Electric Propulsion Satellite Thruster to Meet Constellation Demand
summary: Rocket Lab introduced Gauss, a new electric satellite thruster designed for high-volume production to meet the growing demand for reliable satellite propulsion across commercial and national security constellations.
why_it_matters: The Gauss thruster enhances Rocket Lab's capabilities in satellite propulsion, supporting its strategy to provide comprehensive space systems solutions and strengthen its market position.

headline: Reddit's Q1 2026 Earnings Beat Estimates, Shares Rise
summary: Reddit's Q1 2026 earnings of $1.01 per share exceeded estimates, with shares rising 13.70% in pre-market trading following the announcement.
why_it_matters: The positive market reaction to the earnings report reflects investor confidence in Reddit's financial performance and growth prospects, aligning with the long-term investment thesis that emphasizes the company's strong market position and growth trajectory.

headline: Reddit's Advertising Revenue Grows 74% in Q1 2026

why_it_matters: The significant growth in advertising revenue highlights Reddit's expanding monetization capabilities and its competitive position in the digital advertising market, reinforcing the long-term investment thesis centered on its advertising business model.

headline: IREN Announces Successful Energization of Sweetwater 1
summary: On May 1, 2026, IREN Limited announced the successful energization of its 1.4GW Sweetwater 1 data center site in Texas, marking a key milestone in the development of the broader 2GW Sweetwater campus. This energization is expected to progressively deliver power in line with the phased construction and commissioning of data centers at the site, enhancing IREN's capacity to meet the growing demand for AI infrastructure. ([marketscreener.com](https://www.marketscreener.com/news/iren-announces-successful-energization-of-sweetwater-1-ce7f58d9de8dff26?utm_source=openai))

Mr. Gross is a globally recognized leader in data center engineering, with two decades of industry experience and deep expertise in high-density and liquid-cooled data center design. ([globenewswire.com](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/02/17/3238996/0/en/iren-appoints-john-gross-as-chief-innovation-officer.html?utm_source=openai))

headline: CrowdStrike Named a Frost Radar™ Leader in Cloud Native Application Protection Platforms for the Fourth Consecutive Time

why_it_matters: This recognition underscores CrowdStrike's strong position in the cloud security market, reinforcing its competitive moat and potential for sustained growth as enterprises increasingly adopt cloud-native and AI-driven infrastructures.

headline: CrowdStrike Launches Project QuiltWorks, Uniting the Cybersecurity Industry as Frontier AI Models Accelerate Risk
summary: CrowdStrike has launched Project QuiltWorks, an industry-wide coalition aimed at addressing vulnerabilities in production code discovered by frontier AI models. The initiative includes partners like Accenture, EY, IBM Cybersecurity Services, Kroll, and OpenAI to help organizations assess and remediate AI-induced vulnerabilities.
why_it_matters: By leading this coalition, CrowdStrike demonstrates its commitment to addressing emerging cybersecurity challenges posed by AI, enhancing its reputation as a proactive and innovative leader in the cybersecurity industry.

headline: CrowdStrike Expands Strategic Collaboration With Intel to Secure the Next Generation of AI PCs

why_it_matters: This partnership with Intel enhances CrowdStrike's capabilities in securing AI-driven endpoints, addressing the growing need for robust security solutions in AI-powered devices.

headline: CrowdStrike Unveils Falcon Next-Gen SIEM Support for Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, Advancing Open Security Architecture
summary: CrowdStrike has introduced Falcon Next-Gen SIEM, which now ingests and correlates Microsoft Defender for Endpoint telemetry without requiring additional sensors. This innovation accelerates the transformation of legacy SIEM systems across diverse environments.
why_it_matters: This development enhances CrowdStrike's platform interoperability and positions it as a key player in modernizing security operations, aligning with the industry's shift towards open security architectures.

headline: CrowdStrike Establishes the Endpoint as the Epicenter for AI Security
summary: CrowdStrike has introduced new capabilities across its Falcon platform, establishing the endpoint as the central point for AI security. These innovations extend AI agent discovery, governance, and runtime protection across endpoints, SaaS, browser, and cloud environments.
why_it_matters: By centralizing AI security at the endpoint, CrowdStrike strengthens its position in securing AI workloads, a critical area as AI adoption accelerates across industries.

headline: CrowdStrike Reports Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
summary: CrowdStrike reported Q3 FY2026 revenue of $1.23 billion, a 23.8% year-over-year increase, and an EPS of $0.96, exceeding estimates, with Annual Recurring Revenue reaching $4.75 billion.
why_it_matters: Consistent revenue growth and strong earnings reflect effective execution of growth strategies and market demand for cybersecurity solutions.

headline: CrowdStrike Reports First Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
summary: CrowdStrike reported Q1 FY2026 revenue of $1.10 billion, a 23.8% year-over-year increase, and an EPS of $0.73, exceeding estimates, with Annual Recurring Revenue reaching $4.25 billion.
why_it_matters: Strong financial performance indicates effective execution of growth strategies and robust demand for cybersecurity solutions.
